name: Alaska Paella
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Ground saffron (or 1/2 tsp ground turmeric)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saffron provides the traditional Paella coloring but is expensive. Turmeric can be used as a substitute.
2. Drain the canned salmon and set aside the juice.
3. Heat olive oil in a large pan and cook garlic, onion, and leek for 5 minutes. Stir in rice, prawns, mussels, salmon juice, stock, lemon juice, and saffron (or turmeric).
4. Mix well and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid is nearly absorbed by the rice.
5. Add tomatoes and break the salmon into large flakes before stirring them into the rice.
6. Transfer to a serving dish, garnish with whole prawns and lemon slices, and serve immediately.
Serves 2. Approximately 580 calories per serving.
